subject: (no subject)
body:
Does it pay to try to get Barry and or Lanna to
realize that it is just plain wrong to put the
decision on whether or not to charge, in essence in 
the hands of the police, as we know  the chief has
expressed his misplaced  desire to at least embarass
me at trial, knowing full well they don't have a case.

__________________________________________________
